name: radio-group
title: Radio Group
description: A set of mutually exclusive radio buttons. Built on Base UI Radio Group and Radio with a filled circle indicator.

meta.usage: Wrap RadioGroupItem elements in RadioGroup. Each item needs a unique value. Pair each item with a Label via htmlFor/id. Use vertical layout (default) for most forms; switch to flex-row for short inline choices.
never: Never use RadioGroup for multiple selections; use Checkbox instead
Never skip labelling each item — aria-label or htmlFor required
Never hardcode the indicator colour; it derives from --layout-primary
